SEARCH
Package com.example.model

Class Transaction

java.lang.Object
com.example.model.Transaction
public class Transaction extends Object
The Transaction class represents a credit card transaction in the system. It contains information about the transaction amount, OTP, status, and timestamps. Additionally, it tracks the creation and update details.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the unique identifier of this transaction.
      Returns:
      the ID of the transaction

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Sets the unique identifier of this transaction.
      Parameters:
      id - the new ID to set

    • getCreditCard

      public CreditCard getCreditCard()
      Gets the credit card associated with this transaction.
      Returns:
      the associated credit card

    • setCreditCard

      public void setCreditCard(CreditCard creditCard)
      Sets the credit card associated with this transaction.
      Parameters:
      creditCard - the credit card to associate

    • getCardType

      public CreditCardType getCardType()
      Gets the card type associated with this transaction.
      Returns:
      the card type of the transaction

    • setCardType

      public void setCardType(CreditCardType cardType)
      Sets the card type associated with this transaction.
      Parameters:
      cardType - the card type to associate

    • getAmount

      public BigDecimal getAmount()
      Gets the transaction amount.
      Returns:
      the amount of the transaction

    • setAmount

      public void setAmount(BigDecimal amount)
      Sets the transaction amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount to set for the transaction

    • getOtp

      public String getOtp()
      Gets the OTP used for this transaction.
      Returns:
      the OTP for the transaction

    • setOtp

      public void setOtp(String otp)
      Sets the OTP used for this transaction.
      Parameters:
      otp - the OTP to set

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Gets the current status of this transaction.
      Returns:
      the status of the transaction

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the current status of this transaction.
      Parameters:
      status - the status to set ("pending", "approved", "failed")

    • getCreatedAt

      public LocalDateTime getCreatedAt()
      Gets the timestamp when this transaction was created.
      Returns:
      the creation timestamp of the transaction

    • setCreatedAt

      public void setCreatedAt(LocalDateTime createdAt)
      Sets the timestamp when this transaction was created.
      Parameters:
      createdAt - the new timestamp to set

    • getCreatedBy

      public String getCreatedBy()
      Gets the user who created this transaction.
      Returns:
      the user who created the transaction

    • setCreatedBy

      public void setCreatedBy(String createdBy)
      Sets the user who created this transaction.
      Parameters:
      createdBy - the user who created the transaction

    • getUpdatedBy

      public String getUpdatedBy()
      Gets the user who last updated this transaction.
      Returns:
      the user who last updated the transaction

    • setUpdatedBy

      public void setUpdatedBy(String updatedBy)
      Sets the user who last updated this transaction.
      Parameters:
      updatedBy - the user who last updated the transaction
